why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official table assigns minecraft:commands to packet id 0x10, and the official ClientboundCommandsPacket root-only fixture encodes framed bytes 1001000000 with body 01000000. Stevenarella must dispatch that official id/body without panicking and consume the full body.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panicked in stevenarella/protocol/src/protocol/versions/v26_1_2.rs with bad packet id 0x10 in Clientbound Play, so packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, 0x10, body) did not dispatch the official commands packet.
answer: oracle/answers/775/play_commands_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl records packet_type minecraft:commands, decoded_packet_class net.minecraft.network.protocol.game.ClientboundCommandsPacket, encoded_framed_hex 1001000000, encoded_body_hex 01000000, decoded_entry_count 1, decoded_root_index 0, and remaining decode byte counts 0.
